title: salix × bouchardii
intro: Salix × bouchardii, also known as Bouchard's willow or Balsam willow, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Salix alba and Salix fragilis willow tree species. The plant is rich in salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, and has been used for its medicinal properties to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The health benefits of Salix × bouchardii include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Salix × bouchardii can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its healing properties.
